channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Major foreign holders of U.S. debt may soon sell Treasury bonds and repatriate funds, potentially raising borrowing costs
item.description: Yields on 10- and 30-year Japanese government bonds have surged to their highest levels since the 1990s, and the central bank is expected to tighten policy for the fifth time...

item.title: Taiwan's president says U.S. arms sales, which Trump called a bargaining chip with China, are the 'most important deterrent' against regional conflict
item.description: In December, Trump approved a record $11 billion arms package to Taiwan, including missiles, drones, artillery systems, and military software.

item.title: U.S. says China will purchase $17 billion in agricultural goods annually
item.description: The White House released a fact sheet outlining President Donald Trump's two-day summit in China.

item.title: WHO declares latest Ebola outbreak a global health emergency; rare variant with no approved treatments is responsible
item.description: Health authorities report the current outbreak is caused by the Bundibugyo virus.
